put.description: Store an encrypted Discord bot token for this employee.
Store an encrypted Slack bot token for this employee.

post.description: Upload a file and store its metadata. File saved to the configured storage backend.

get.description: List all documents for an organization, optionally filtered by employee.
Stream document content to the client, or redirect to a presigned S3 URL.

post.description:
Execute the authenticated internal AI agent test route.

Requires a valid JWT bearer token. The route is intended for dashboard
testing and development — production bot gateways call the graph
in-process.
Ingest fact or document snippet into employee memory database.

get.description:
Redirect the browser to Slack's OAuth authorize page.

The ``employee_id`` and ``org_id`` are baked into a signed state
parameter so the callback can associate the token with the right
employee.

parameters.name: redirect_to

schema.description: URL to redirect back to after callback
schema.title: Redirect To

parameters.description: URL to redirect back to after callback

get.description:
Handle the OAuth redirect from Slack.

1. Validates the state JWT to recover employee / org.
2. Exchanges the ``code`` for a bot token via Slack's API.
3. Encrypts and stores the token on the employee record.
4. Redirects the browser back to the employee's dashboard page.

parameters.name: state

schema.description: State parameter echoed back by Slack
schema.title: State

parameters.description: State parameter echoed back by Slack
